blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Implement an endpoint that verifies customer notifications regarding price changes.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Customer notification of price changes', but the evidence does not confirm that this requirement is met. While the linked use case mentions that customers receive real-time updates about job duration and potential additional charges, there is no explicit evidence provided that demonstrates the system's capability to notify customers specifically about price changes. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming that customers are notified specifically about price changes.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add notification confirmation endpoint
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Implement an endpoint that verifies customer notifications regarding price changes.
